home.heroTitle: Manage your properties with clarity and ease
home.heroDesc: Domera replaces Excel, paper and chaotic processes with one digital platform for property managers and residents.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage properties
home.featuresDesc: From resident invitations to automated invoice generation
home.f1Desc: Buildings, apartments, residents — a flexible hierarchy for one or many properties.
home.f2Desc: Water, electricity, heat — meter readings collected automatically.
home.f3Desc: Automatic calculation, invoice generation and payment history.
home.f4Desc: Contracts, acts, files — secure storage with fast access.
home.f5Desc: Notifications, messages and requests from residents in one place.
home.f6Desc: Admin, manager, accountant, resident — each with their own access.
home.forMgmtItems: Building and apartment database|Meter reading collection|Automatic invoice calculation|Debt control|Document storage
home.forResItems: Submit meter readings|Receive and pay invoices|Payment history|Communicate with management|Get notifications
home.step1Desc: Create an account and add your property.
home.step3Desc: Meters, invoices and notifications run automatically.
home.ctaDesc: Use Domera for free. No credit card required.

appShell.title: Property operations workspace
appShell.description: Modular frontend for management teams, accountants and residents.
appShell.backendDescription: NestJS routes and Firebase-based auth can be connected through the shared API layer.

dashboard.operationalPulseDesc: Daily workflow blocks for property managers and residents

buildings.title: Buildings and apartments
buildings.emptyDescription: Add the first building to the company portfolio using the button above.

fields.name: Building name
fields.hotWaterMetersPerResident: Hot water meters in the apartment
fields.coldWaterMetersPerResident: Cold water meters in the apartment

water.title: Water reading submissions
water.description: Residents will submit water readings for the apartment.

electricity.title: Electricity reading submissions
electricity.description: Enable this if residents must submit electricity readings.

heating.title: Heating reading submissions
heating.description: Enable this if residents must submit heating readings.

create.title: Add building
create.description: Fill in the main building information to add it to the company portfolio.

edit.title: Edit building information
edit.description: Update the building details. More advanced settings can be added here later.

delete.title: Delete building
delete.description: Delete building {building}? This action cannot be undone.
delete.warning: If apartments or other data are still linked to this building, the server may reject deletion.

errors.companyMissing: companyId is missing for building management.
errors.creationAccessFailed: Failed to verify building creation access.
errors.buildingMissing: No building was selected for editing.
errors.apartmentsCountInvalid: Apartment count must be 0 or greater.
errors.hotWaterMetersInvalid: Hot water meter count must be 0 or greater.
errors.coldWaterMetersInvalid: Cold water meter count must be 0 or greater.
errors.occupiedApartmentsInvalid: Occupied apartment count must be 0 or greater.
errors.occupiedExceedsTotal: Occupied apartments cannot exceed the total apartment count.
errors.updateFailed: Failed to update the building information.

gating.title: Building creation is temporarily restricted
gating.defaultMessage: The company can currently add buildings without a subscription, but a dedicated access check is already in place.
gating.futureHint: Later, adding a building can require an active subscription or an access code without redesigning the interface.

residents.title: Residents and users
residents.description: Invitation status, roles and apartment assignment

meterReadings.title: Meter readings
meterReadings.description: Submission tracking for water and utility data

resident.emptyDescription: No apartment is currently assigned to you.
resident.emptyHint: If you should have access to an apartment, please contact the management company.
resident.residentDescription: The apartment you are registered in.

management.registryDescription: Full list of apartments with occupancy and owner overview.

assignResident.title: Assign resident
assignResident.description: Choose who should be linked to apartment {apartment}.
assignResident.hint: Choose “No assigned resident” to remove the current resident.
assignResident.empty: There are no residents available for assignment yet.

deleteApartment.title: Delete apartment
deleteApartment.description: Delete apartment {apartment}? This action cannot be undone.
deleteApartment.occupiedHint: This apartment still has an assigned resident. Remove the resident first.

tenantAccess.title: Manage access
tenantAccess.description: Manage owner and residents for apartment {apartment}.

apartmentInfo.title: Apartment № {apartment}
apartmentInfo.description: All available apartment information in one place.

feedback.residentUnassigned: Resident access was removed from apartment {apartment}.

errors.residentSaveFailed: Failed to update the apartment resident.

import.title: Import apartments
import.description: Upload an apartment file for the selected building. Excel, JSON and XML are supported.
import.hint: For Excel and CSV you can use spreadsheet columns. For JSON and XML use the fields listed below.
import.selectBuildingFirst: Choose a building in the selector first.
import.selectionHint: The import is always applied to the building currently selected in the top selector.
import.buildingHint: You can choose the building right here — the import will be applied to it.
import.structureHint: When JSON or XML is selected, the file should match one of the structures below.

json.label: JSON
json.description: Array of apartments or an object with items/apartments.

xml.label: XML
xml.description: Structure with apartment/item/record nodes inside a root element.

ownerEmail.label: E pasts Reķiniem
ownerEmail.description: Email used for invoices and notifications.

area.label: Area / management area
area.description: Can be used for apartment area or management area.

hotWaterReadings.label: Kartsais + menesis
hotWaterReadings.description: Hot water reading and month. These column pairs can be repeated multiple times.

coldWaterReadings.label: Aukstais + menesis
coldWaterReadings.description: Cold water reading and month. These column pairs can be repeated multiple times.

examples.title: How to import
examples.excel: Excel/CSV: use columns Kadastra numurs, Adrese, Domājamā daļa, Daļa (kopīpašums), Īpašnieks, E pasts Reķiniem, DZ, Stavs, DZ t, Apkure, Apsaimn, Dekl iedz, Kartsais NR, Aukstais NR, plus repeated Kartsais + menesis and Aukstais + menesis pairs.

export.title: Export data
export.description: Choose the file format and which data to export.
export.hint: Apartment exports include all available backend fields, even if they are not visible in the table.

json.label: JSON
json.description: Best for full exports with nested fields preserved.

csv.label: CSV
csv.description: Easy to open in Excel; nested values will be serialized as text.

apartments.label: Apartments only
apartments.description: Export all apartment data from the current list.

meterReadings.label: Meter readings only
meterReadings.description: Export meter readings for apartments in the current list.

apartmentsAndMeterReadings.label: Apartments + meter readings
apartmentsAndMeterReadings.description: Full export of apartments and related meter readings.

readings.title: Meter exception
readings.description: If this apartment has different meter counts than the building default, set an override here.
readings.buildingDefaultsHint: Current building default: hot water meters — {hot}, cold water meters — {cold}.
readings.hotWaterMeters: Hot water meters in the apartment
readings.coldWaterMeters: Cold water meters in the apartment

deleteAll.title: Delete apartments
deleteAll.description: Delete all apartments in the current list?
deleteAll.scope: There are currently {count} apartments in this list.
deleteAll.hint: Occupied apartments will be skipped automatically.

feedback.nothingToExport: There is no data to export.
feedback.noVacantApartmentsToDelete: There are no vacant apartments to delete.

errors.companyMissing: The companyId for this action is missing.
errors.chooseBuildingFirst: Choose a building first for this action.
errors.chooseBuildingForDelete: Choose a specific building before bulk deletion.
errors.hotWaterMetersInvalid: Hot water meter count must be 0 or greater.
errors.coldWaterMetersInvalid: Cold water meter count must be 0 or greater.

errors.emailCantBeCompanyEmail: Tenant email cannot be the same as the management company email.
errors.emailCantBeOwnerEmail: Tenant email cannot be the same as the apartment owner email.
errors.emailCantBeTenantEmail: This email is already invited as a tenant.

success.invited: Tenant {email} was granted access to apartment {apartment}.

alerts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

details.notFoundDescription: The requested apartment was not found.
details.companyQuestions: If you have any questions, contact the management company.

system.permissionDenied: No database access. Check Firebase security rules.
system.dbError: Error connecting to the database. Try again.

notifications.invitationMessage: You have been invited to join an apartment.

form.passwordHint: Minimum 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol
form.emailFixedByInvite: Email is fixed by the invitation

system.confirmDeleteProfile: Confirm profile deletion. This action cannot be undone.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your email and password to sign in
auth.registerSubtitle: Register to get started with Domera
auth.registerCompanyEmailHint: Optional: use this if the company email differs from your login email
auth.registerLegalConsentHint: To complete registration, please confirm your agreement with the privacy policy and the user terms.
auth.privacyPolicySubtitle: How Domera collects, uses, and protects your data.
auth.privacyPolicySectionDataBody: Domera stores account registration details, contact information, company information, and service data required to operate the platform.
auth.privacyPolicySectionUsageBody: Your data is used for authentication, access control, property management workflows, notifications, documents, and overall service improvement.
auth.privacyPolicySectionRightsBody: You may request updates, corrections, or deletion of your personal data in accordance with applicable law and platform policies.
auth.termsOfUseSubtitle: The main rules for using the Domera platform.
auth.termsOfUseSectionAccessBody: Users must provide accurate information and keep their account credentials and login methods secure.
auth.termsOfUseSectionResponsibilitiesBody: Users are responsible for the accuracy of submitted data, the legality of their actions, and using the platform only for intended service-related purposes.
auth.termsOfUseSectionRestrictionsBody: It is prohibited to compromise platform security, interfere with service operations, use another person's data without permission, or violate applicable law.
auth.registerVerificationSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to finish creating your account
auth.registerVerificationSentTo: We sent a confirmation code to {email}
auth.registerVerificationCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your email
auth.registerVerificationResent: A new confirmation code has been sent.
auth.registerVerificationMissing: Your pending registration was not found. Please return to the registration form and try again.
auth.registerVerificationUnexpected: Verification could not be completed. Please request a new code.
auth.accountTypeManagerDesc: Manage buildings, apartments and billing from one workspace
auth.accountTypeResidentDesc: Track invoices, submit meter readings and stay connected with building management
auth.accountTypeLandlordDesc: Manage your apartments and grant access to tenants
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.checkEmailDesc: A password reset link has been sent to your email
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter and confirm your new password
auth.resetLinkInvalid: The reset link is missing or invalid.
auth.invitationSubtitle: You have been invited to join this apartment on Domera
auth.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired or is invalid
auth.rightPanelTitle: Manage apartments, residents and payments in one place.
auth.rightPanelDesc: Sign in to your workspace, track key metrics and maintain clear communication with residents.
auth.rightPanelFeature1: Real-time buildings, apartments and invoices dashboard
auth.rightPanelFeature2: Secure role-based access for managers and residents
auth.rightPanelFeature3: Automatic reminders and simple payment tracking
